name: Valuer Holding A/S
summary: Valuer Holding A/S operates a platform for the management of workflows to corporations, accelerators, and venture funds worldwide. Its products include Innovation Themes, a solution to predict, evaluate, and prioritize innovation areas mission critical to the users' business through data-driven intelligence; and Innovation Radar, a solution that allows users to monitor the technology and business model landscapes relevant to their organization. The company also provides Diligence-as-a-Service, as well as strategy and scaling advisory services. It serves customers in the healthcare and biotechnology, cyber security, energy, mobility, industrial engineering, financial services, sustainability, and other industries. The company was founded in 2017 and is based in Copenhagen, Denmark.
